title: Leo
tmdbOverview: Parthiban, a cafe owner, lives with his family in Himachal Pradesh. Things take an absurd turn for him when he gets in the way of a drug cartel.
synopsis: Released in 2023, Leo is a action, crime and thriller film from India. It holds a solid 7.2 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2020s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a 15 certification (GB rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
